declarations.name: EventLog
declarations.goal: Append-only JSON log storing immutable events with monotonic ids and timestamps.
constraint: Events are never mutated or deleted; only appended.
Log is serialized as JSON, standard library only.

declarations.name: EventRecord
declarations.goal: Define the immutable event schema (id, timestamp, type, payload) shared by all commands.
constraint: Every event carries a unique monotonic id and ISO-8601 timestamp.

declarations.name: TaskState
declarations.goal: Represent the derived in-memory state of tasks produced by folding events.

declarations.name: TaskModel
declarations.goal: Define the Task record with id, title, tags, status, created/completed timestamps.

declarations.name: EventValidator
declarations.goal: Reject events that would violate invariants such as completing unknown or already-completed tasks.

declarations.name: Reducer
declarations.goal: Pure function folding an event stream into a TaskState.

declarations.name: SnapshotStore
declarations.goal: Persist and load JSON snapshots of TaskState tagged with the last event id they cover.

declarations.name: UndoRedoStack
declarations.goal: Track applied and reverted event ids so undo/redo can replay a truncated event stream.

declarations.name: QueryEngine
declarations.goal: Answer queries over TaskState by status, tag, or date range.

declarations.name: AddTask
declarations.goal: Append an AddTask event that introduces a new task after validation.

declarations.name: CompleteTask
declarations.goal: Append a CompleteTask event marking an existing open task complete.

declarations.name: ListTasks
declarations.goal: Return current tasks, optionally filtered via the query engine.

declarations.name: Undo
declarations.goal: Revert the most recent user action by rewinding the event stream.

declarations.name: Redo
declarations.goal: Reapply the most recently undone action.

declarations.name: Snapshot
declarations.goal: Write a snapshot of the current derived state to the snapshot store.

declarations.name: ReplayFromSnapshot
declarations.goal: Load latest snapshot and fold only events newer than it to rebuild current state.

declarations.name: CLI
declarations.goal: Expose all commands through a small argparse-based command line interface.

declarations.name: TestSuite
declarations.goal: Self-contained unittest suite covering reducer purity, validator rejections, snapshot compaction, and undo/redo.

declarations.name: DemoMain
declarations.goal: A main.py that exercises add, complete, query, snapshot, undo, redo, and replay end-to-end.
